summary: This brief post announces that Cathy O'Neil has stopped actively blogging on mathbabe.org. The site will remain online as an archive of her previous work. She expresses hope that readers will continue to find value in the archived content.
key_points: The blog is no longer being actively updated
All previous content will remain accessible as an archive
The author maintains goodwill toward her readership
money_quotes: I've stopped blogging, but I'm keeping mathbabe.org around as an archive, which I hope you enjoy!
key_insight: Even when ending a project, preserving the archive allows past work to continue providing value to readers.
